message:
feat(mux): persist UI state (overview, quick terminal, inspector) for shared sessions

- Add server-side state for overview_open, quick_terminal_open, inspector_open
- Broadcast UI state changes to all connected clients for shared sessions
- Send UI states when control client connects (persistence across page reload)
- Add HTTP read timeout to fix Ctrl+C shutdown hanging
- Preview no longer pauses panels - they continue streaming
